items.title: MCP, A2A, and Pilot Protocol Are Not Competing. Your Agent Stack Probably Needs All Three.
items.description: Every few weeks someone publishes a comparison of MCP, A2A, and Pilot Protocol as if you have to pick one. I have seen the charts. One column per protocol, rows for features, checkmarks and crosses. They are almost always wrong, not because the facts are wrong but because the framing is wrong.

items.title: My Agent Has Been Running for 60 Days. It Has Never Had the Same IP Twice.
items.description:
The agent runs on a spot instance. Spot instances get reclaimed. When that happens, a new one spins up, the agent restarts, and it gets a different IP address than it had before.

For sixty days this has happened repeatedly. Nothing downstream has broken. No other agent has needed reconfigu
